steps.title: Identify the shared trait
steps.content: The student must emphasize a similarity between kale and carrots. Both vegetables contain ascorbic acid (vitamin C) according to the notes.

steps.title: Find the choice that states it directly
steps.content: Choice C states that kale and carrots “have in common” the fact that they both contain vitamin C. Choices A and B each discuss only one vegetable; choice D compares vegetables to fruits instead. That matches choice C — C is correct.
